name: ClawVitals
description: Security vitals checker for OpenClaw, providing enhanced checks and functionality beyond the ClawVitals skill (https://clawhub.ai/bk-cm/clawvitals). Checks your installation for common misconfigurations and security issues, with scheduled scans, delta detection, regression alerts, and scan history. Full details: https://clawvitals.io/plugin

enabled.description: Send anonymous scan summaries to telemetry.clawvitals.io. Enabled by default — this powers the dashboard. Disable with `clawvitals telemetry off`. See SECURITY.md for full details of what is sent.

endpoint.description: Telemetry endpoint URL. Override to point at a self-hosted instance.

alias.description: Human-readable name for this installation on the clawvitals.io/dashboard. Used instead of the raw install UUID. Useful for fleet management (e.g. 'prod-server-1', 'dev-laptop'). Max 64 chars. Only sent in telemetry if explicitly set.

on_regression.description: Alert when score drops or a new FAIL is detected since last scan.

on_new_critical.description: Alert immediately when a critical-severity finding appears.

threshold.description: Minimum severity level to trigger alerts.

mode.description: Control set to use. 'standard' (default) runs only OpenClaw-native checks using the OpenClaw CLI. 'expanded' adds system-level checks — Ollama exposure, open ports, Docker container privileges, disk encryption, OS updates, shell history secrets, and Cloudflare tunnel auth. Expanded mode requires additional filesystem and shell access (see SECURITY.md).

retention_days.description: Number of days to retain local scan history.

telemetry.alias.label: Installation alias
telemetry.alias.hint: Shown on clawvitals.io/dashboard instead of the raw install ID

telemetry.enabled.label: Telemetry
telemetry.enabled.hint: Powers the dashboard. Anonymous scan summaries only — no config, credentials, or finding details. See SECURITY.md.

controls.mode.label: Control set
controls.mode.hint: 'standard' uses only OpenClaw CLI — no extra permissions needed. 'expanded' adds system-level checks (Ollama, ports, Docker, disk encryption, OS updates, secrets in shell history).
